# Optimal, LLC

> Optimal is an AI security advisory firm for regulated and federal missions.
> We assess and red-team AI systems, engineer the governed access layer that
> keeps them accountable, and advise teams on adopting AI safely — across
> GovCloud, on-prem, and air-gapped environments.

## About

- **Legal name:** Optimal, LLC
- **Website:** https://gooptimal.io
- **Contact:** ryan@gooptimal.io

## Certifications & set-aside eligibility

- **Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business (SDVOSB)** — SBA-certified.
- **Veteran-Owned Small Business (VOSB)** — SBA-certified.
- Certified through the U.S. Small Business Administration (SBA) Veteran Small
  Business Certification (VetCert) program; publicly listed on the SBA
  certification registry at https://search.certifications.sba.gov/.
- Eligible to compete for **SDVOSB and VOSB set-aside contracts**.

## Services

- AI Security Assessment — structured evaluation of AI systems, pipelines, and integrations against real adversary attack paths, mapped to the OWASP LLM Top 10, MITRE ATLAS, and NIST AI RMF.
- Adversarial AI Testing (red team) — prompt injection, model and context manipulation, data and secret extraction, and abuse-case simulation.
- Governed AI Engineering — design and stand-up of a Zero Trust access layer for AI in the client's environment: authenticated gateway, prompt guardrails, default-deny egress, and a defensible audit trail.
- Secure AI Adoption Advisory — practical usage patterns, threat models, and secure-adoption roadmaps scoped to an organization's risk profile.

## Reference pattern (Governed AI Engineering)

- Authenticated gateway — one governed endpoint to every approved model, per-key virtual credentials (LiteLLM), no SDK rewrite. Caller auth via Cloudflare Access and Okta OIDC.
- Prompt guardrails — NeMo Guardrails, fail-closed and pre-call; unit-tested secret and PII detectors.
- Default-deny egress — Squid allowlist proxy plus security-group enforcement; no configuration opt-out.
- Audit trail — structured JSON joined to Postgres by request ID; defensible without vendor-UI screenshots.

## Reference architecture

- Open-source Zero Trust AI gateway reference design: https://github.com/optimal-cyber/AI-Gateway

## Standards (engineering targets)

NIST AI RMF, OWASP LLM Top 10, MITRE ATLAS, NIST 800-207 Zero Trust, CIS
Benchmarks, DISA STIG, ISO 42001, SOC 2.
